reviews.review_text: Really impressed! Great food, amazing updates, fast, delicious, and the best server we have encountered in a long time. Olivia was the best!

Super delicious food, great service and reasonable prices! The steak fajita meat had a great sear and was super meaty flavored; the birria tacos tortillss were nice and crisp on the outside and the meat was super tender. Olivia took great care of us and was very attentive and friendly

In town for just the night, So picked this restaurant. A home-run selection! Great food, even better service (thank you Olivia!) and we left full and happy! I had the chile rellanos, the ladies had birria tacos, and the son had a fajita burrito.
Really impressed! Great food, amazing updates, fast, delicious, and the best server we have encountered in a long time. Olivia was the best!
Food was amazing!!!!!! Serves was great. Keenan was efficient. Thank you

First time here and great experience. Staff continuously checked on my friend and I. Autumn M had a great convo with us really an amazing person! Overall experience was 10/10. Thank you!! I will be back
Really impressed! Great food, amazing updates, fast, delicious, and the best server we have encountered in a long time. Olivia was the best!
Autumn was server. Great service!!
Autumn was a great server, and the food was great
Really impressed! Great food, amazing updates, fast, delicious, and the best server we have encountered in a long time. Olivia was the best!
My favorite taco place. Consistently produces the best tacos in town.
Autum was the best waitress ever!!

Super delicious food, great service and reasonable prices! The steak fajita meat had a great sear and was super meaty flavored; the birria tacos tortillss were nice and crisp on the outside and the meat was super tender. Olivia took great care of us and was very attentive and friendly
Autumn gave us great service, was very kind and friendly. No complaints.
Happened upon this place traveling through town. It was excellent, the staff was very friendly service was prompt ant the food was excellent.
Their street tacos are the closer thing to authentic Mexican food In Saginaw  I have found to date so far. I live in Mexico most of the year and am constantly searching for the foods I eat there.
My favorite taco place. Consistently produces the best tacos in town.
Excellent food! The guacamole was chunky, the way I like it. The refried bean had really good flavor and the street tacos were very yummy. We will be going back!

Super delicious food, great service and reasonable prices! The steak fajita meat had a great sear and was super meaty flavored; the birria tacos tortillss were nice and crisp on the outside and the meat was super tender. Olivia took great care of us and was very attentive and friendly
Olivia was awesome! Food was great, as always. But Olivia was very attentive and enjoyable!
olivia took great care of us, very attentive and patient! created & held conversation amazing service !
Service was good, the waitress Arianna was very professional.
Autum was the best waitress ever!!

If you haven’t been to Rio Luna Taco & Tequila yet, you’re missing out. I stopped in for lunch yesterday and had a great experience.

The food was excellent, the fajitas were some of the best I’ve had in Saginaw. The prices were also very reasonable, especially for the portion sizes and quality.

What really stood out was the service. I believe my waitress’s name was Nola, and she was very friendly, attentive, and welcoming throughout the meal. Great food, good value, and excellent service. I’ll definitely be back again soon.

Recent takeout order we had ordered two tacos (on top of a few other meals for the family)and they tried to charge us for the taco dinner (and yes the dinner was there in the bag) but I explicitly ordered just two tacos, we didn't need the entire meal that's $10 more. So I brought it up to them before I left; the hostess went to get the manager and instead of just giving us the two tacos and having me pay for them, they removed the entire dinner from the bag and stated they could not just sell me the two tacos that I had ordered over the phone for some reason. They didn't even try to fix the issue (considering their person wrote down the order incorrectly) and I didn't get to eat anything because they removed my order. I would've been fine just taking the two tacos or literally anything else rather than leaving without a meal for part of my family and paying for it...

Maybe I'm overreacting, maybe not, but it really rubbed me the wrong way considering we (not kidding when I say this) spend over $2000 a year at this particular location (my wife is a queso fiend). Suffice to say it will be some time before we return...

Arrived was seated sat there for approximately 30 minutes while various waitresses served their tables a while trying to avoid making any contact with my table. Watched others come in after me and get waited on, their orders taken, and their food brought to them. Left after I saw that. Then on the way out, a waitress that was never seen before carrying a tray of food, runs after me on my way out the door saying she'll take care of me and to not leave. After 30 minutes of without any service, my decision was made.

I showed up today 15 minutes after my take out was supposed to be ready. The girl at the front looked for my order and then came back and hid behind another employee. I found that strange.
The other employee asked for my name, went to the back and also came back with no information about my order.

Thinking maybe I ordered from the wrong place I left, drove up the street to check at another restaurant. After the other restaurant came up with nothing I called Rio Luna back and tried to explain the situation. The girl on the phone was the same girl who checked for my order the first time, she cut me off and said "yes it's here".

Now, over 20 minutes after my order was supposed to be ready I walk back into the restaurant and was told it was just now getting bagged up. The same girl walks out with my order. I show her my text confirmation, with the time it was supposed to be ready and how it was under a different name (los tres amigos) and she just looks at me and shrugs. She did not care.

I finally get home with my order and my receipt was $8 less than what I paid?! I left a message for management right away, but haven't heard back as of yet.

Came here for half off appetizers about an hour before closing. The hostess sat my mom but never informed the waitress that she had a table, so she sat there waiting and had to ask someone else who was going to wait on her.

After we ate and paid, we were tidying up the table to make it easier for our waitress to pick everything up (like we always do when we got out to eat), and for some reason another waitress (Olivia) that didn’t wait on us kept coming up to our table, rushing us. She started cleaning the table off while we were still there and told us that they’re closed at they need to sweep and mop. Unsure why she felt the need to tell paying customers that they needed to hurry up and leave.

When we decided to escalate the issue to another employee (possibly a manager, unsure), she followed us and stood behind us. I thought she was in a rush to clean? Why did she stop cleaning to come be nosy? Wasn’t she in a rush because the restaurant was now closed? Wouldn’t her standing there listening be holding her up?

Not only did she stop cleaning (which is why she was rushing us), but she then proceeded to argue with my mother and try to throw us out.

She had no right to come to our table rushing us. We were finished eating and already cleaning up. We had already paid. Olivia is unprofessional, rude, and lacks etiquette. Please retrain her.

Watched others come in after me and get waited on, their orders taken, and their food brought to them. Left after I saw that. I was very much looking forward to stopping in based on the reviews. Left feeling disappointed in every way. We went in, and waited several minutes at an unbusy time for someone to even notice us standing at the host stand, to the point where we were wondering if we were supposed to sit ourselves. We finally got seated, and while our food got out at a reasonable time, our server did not bring refills of anything or ask the entire time we were sitting. Our food was lukewarm at best, and save for the specialty marinated pork taco and the refried beans, was bland. My Al Pastor taco was dry, burnt (not the good kind of char), and flavorless. There were plenty of staff but save for a couple of them, most were standing around in the staff area doing nothing. Idk if we caught them on an off-day or not, but it was a subpar experience all around.

Olivia was awesome! Food was great, as always. But Olivia was very attentive and enjoyable!

Olivia was fantastic. She managed a very large party with ease and grace. We had several different requests and she fulfilled them without a problem! I wish the food was a little better but I know to get the street tacos next time.
Delicious food every time I come here. It is always super clean and a great staff! Our server Olivia was fantastic, super attentive and friendly!
Food was amazing!!!!!! Serves was great. Keenan was efficient. Thank you
Olivia was awesome! Food was great, as always. But Olivia was very attentive and enjoyable!
Olivia was AMAZING!! Loved having her as our waitress! Food was awesome as well :)

We had such a great experience. The food was delicious, Our waiter Keenan was awesome, attentive and friendly
Highly recommend trying this place out, you won't be disappointed 😊

Their street tacos are the closer thing to authentic Mexican food In Saginaw  I have found to date so far. I live in Mexico most of the year and am constantly searching for the foods I eat there.
My favorite taco place. Consistently produces the best tacos in town.
Excellent food! The guacamole was chunky, the way I like it. The refried bean had really good flavor and the street tacos were very yummy. We will be going back!
Their street tacos are the closer thing to authentic Mexican food In Saginaw  I have found to date so far. I live in Mexico most of the year and am constantly searching for the foods I eat there.

Excellent food! The guacamole was chunky, the way I like it. The refried bean had really good flavor and the street tacos were very yummy. We will be going back!
Tried for the first time food was excellent. We had carnitas and boarder asada tacos. We would go back. Though the house margarita, not a fan.
Olivia was an amazing server, very attentive, friendly and kind! The food was delicious and came from the kitchen very quickly. Try the mango margarita!
Been here many times Hospitality is A1 love the food love the drinks always come back for a margarita
Their street tacos are the closer thing to authentic Mexican food In Saginaw  I have found to date so far. I live in Mexico most of the year and am constantly searching for the foods I eat there.
Excellent food! The guacamole was chunky, the way I like it. The refried bean had really good flavor and the street tacos were very yummy. We will be going back!

One of our favorite places for tacos and Mexican food. The street tacos are exceptional, personal favorites are the Birria tacos, and tacos Al pastor. They come with beans and rice/cheese which are forward cooked well, and the complimentary chips and salsa are yummy as well. Fairly priced also, especially on Taco Tuesdays when they are discounted!

Super delicious food, great service and reasonable prices! The steak fajita meat had a great sear and was super meaty flavored; the birria tacos tortillss were nice and crisp on the outside and the meat was super tender. Olivia took great care of us and was very attentive and friendly

They come with beans and rice/cheese which are forward cooked well, and the complimentary chips and salsa are yummy as well. Fairly priced also, especially on Taco Tuesdays when they are discounted!
Burrito was mainly rice and beans, paid for chicken in my beef Burrito and got 4 tiny pieces.  Won't be back.

I was in this pathetic place tonight spent 62.00 on some d og food. Tacos was cold, not warm the meat was cold , skimpy and bland. The Chimichanga taste like tomato sauce and beans mixed with little pieces of shredded beef., horrible! Refried beans were horrible...the worst Mexican food I've ever tasted and now they have the nerve to have a vm where I can't talk to a real person. The vieggie fahitta was ok according to the person who ate it...i will never visit this place again...to say the least, I  am pissed the hell off.
Excellent! Guacamole, torta, everything was excellent. Kids and wife liked the food, as well. Definitely worth a visit.
Excellent food! The guacamole was chunky, the way I like it. The refried bean had really good flavor and the street tacos were very yummy. We will be going back!

We had ceviche verde, poppers, carne Asada street tacos and mole enchiladas. All very flavorful and plenty of meats. Drinks were sooooo good. VIANCA was very attentive and polite. Would definitely come back. And bring family.
